content.en:
There is a secret medicine in the True River Valley that helps the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords to impact to the Dao Realm, which is not as good as the Wuji Secret Medicine, but it can also increase the success rate of one percent.

This secret medicine is called the True River Secret Medicine!

And the True River Secret Medicine can also be exchanged for contribution points, which is still one million contribution points for one copy.

Ye Tian was very interested in the True River Secret Elixir, but he wanted the formula of the True River Secret Elixir more than a True River Secret Elixir.

But if you think about it carefully, you can also know that the formula of the True River Secret Medicine is definitely in the hands of a few Supreme Dao Realms, or even only in the hands of one Supreme Dao Realm, and it is simply too difficult for him to obtain the formula of the True River Secret Medicine.

"I still have to improve my strength to the Dao realm, and the matter of the formula will have to be talked about later!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He was going to raise the cultivation of this copy body to the Supreme Dao Realm first, and he didn't ask for any foundation, as long as the cultivation of this copy body was raised to the limit of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, he would begin to impact the Dao Realm.

However, he was going to exchange for a few more copies of the True River Secret Elixir to copy the real body or use it for the human race in the future.

So, in the following years, he often entered the True Pole Land, collected various resource materials, exchanged them again and again, and obtained more and more contribution points.

this day.

He collected another million contribution points and exchanged them for a True River Secret Elixir.

Before I knew it, eight hundred years had passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's cultivation of the Cave Light Replicating Body had also reached the limit of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

He was ready to storm into the Dao Realm.

Of course.

He doesn't know how to use the True River Secret Medicine, even if he uses the True River Secret Medicine, it is only a two-percent success rate, and there is no difference between a one-percent success rate and a two-percent success rate for Ye Tian.

"The impact to the Dao Realm will not be too big in the Infinite Domain, but once it fails, it will be easy to be discovered, so you have to find a few opportunities to leave here, impact to the Dao Realm in a remote place, and come back if you succeed. "

Ye Tian decided.

Then, he left the True River Valley on the pretext of going out to find an opportunity, and then kept shuttling until he came to a very remote fragment.

"There aren't any living beings here, just impact the Dao Realm here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He first copied a replica body, and when the impact failed, he could continue to attack.

One percent success rate, a few more impacts, and it will be successful.

Soon, the onslaught began.

He used the Gathering Stars Secret Technique to begin to absorb the power of the Origin, and this Origin Power was not the origin of the Origin Realm, but the origin of this heaven and earth, and a trace of the Origin was absorbed by Ye Tian's Gathering Stars Secret Technique, and then combined with the Secret Text of the Supreme Dao in the Secret Technique of Gathering Stars.

He has already understood these secret texts.

Then, he integrated it into his body and slammed it into the Dao realm.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian's body began to crack, and finally the power of the Supreme Dao Rules penetrated the body, and the entire body began to collapse.

In the end, Ye Tian only broke through in half a step, but his life was passing.

"Failed!"

In this regard, he is not surprised at all, if the success rate of one percent can break through for the first time, then the luck is too good!

Thereupon.

Ye Tian continued to impact the Dao Realm.

Soon, the second breakthrough failed.

Continue to impact the Dao Realm for the third time.

......

As the years passed, Ye Tian's luck was a little worse, and he didn't succeed until the ninth time, which was already very bad luck.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body is undergoing transformation, and his strength is undergoing a drastic improvement.

At this moment, his body was no longer an ordinary body, but the body of the Supreme Dao, exuding the aura of the rules of the Supreme Dao.

After a long time, the cultivation of his body stabilized at the early stage of the First Rank Dao Realm.

However, in terms of true combat power, his body is not as good as the true body of the Eighth Balance Realm to copy the body!

Of course, Ye Tian just used this cave light to copy his body for some benefits, and he didn't use this copy body all the time.

"It's time to go back to the True River Valley!"

Ye Tian quickly returned to the True River Valley.

When he returned to the True River Valley, he caused the shock of these Dao realms in the True River Valley.

"Dongguang, you actually broke through?"

Zhenhe, the valley lord of the True River Valley, looked at Ye Tian with a look of surprise.

"Valley Master, I broke through by luck!" Ye Tian said lightly.

"Hahaha, congratulations to Brother Dongguang!"

"Brother Dongguang, congratulations!"

One by one, the Dao realm congratulated one after another.

In their opinion, Ye Tian broke through to the Supreme Dao Realm and strengthened the strength of the True River Valley!

Subsequently, a grand event was held throughout the True River Valley to congratulate the True River Valley on the birth of a new Supreme Dao Realm, which was a very fortunate thing, and it was also a declaration to the outside world that the True River Valley had become more powerful.

And as Ye Tian's duplicate body broke through to the Supreme Dao Realm, he was also promoted by True River to the elder of True River Valley.

After becoming an elder in the True River Valley, Ye Tian was exposed to more knowledge, which was equivalent to stepping into another circle, which was Ye Tian's purpose.

......

"The formula of the True River Secret Medicine is in the hands of the Lord of the True River Valley!"

When Ye Tian learned this information, he knew that if he wanted to obtain the formula of the True River Secret Medicine, it was currently impossible, and it was impossible for the Lord of the True River Valley to give him the formula of the secret medicine.

However, the secret texts of the Supreme Dao in the True River Valley, he can comprehend them.

True River Valley has mastered a total of three hundred and twelve Supreme Dao Secret Texts, and the Supreme Dao Secret Texts are very important, such as creating the Supreme Dao Secret Technique, refining the Supreme Dao Weapon also requires the Supreme Dao Secret Text, and even the Supreme Dao Formation requires the Supreme Dao Secret Text.

It can be said that the secret text of the Supreme Dao involves the path of refining weapons, formations, etc.

However, with only more than 300 Supreme Dao Secret Texts, even if they were all thoroughly understood, it would be difficult to create a secret technique that could impact the Dao Realm.

Moreover, Ye Tian also knew that the Supreme Dao Divine Power also needed to combine the Supreme Dao Secret Text with the Supreme Dao rules before it could be created.

Like the Heavenly Stamp he created, it is actually a pseudo-Supreme Dao Divine Power, and there is a big gap between it and the real Supreme Dao Divine Power.

There is a big gap in strength between a Supreme Dao Realm who has mastered the Supreme Dao Divine Power and the Supreme Dao Realm who does not have the Supreme Dao Divine Power.

And the True River Valley is only a small force, those Supreme Dao Realms have not mastered the Supreme Dao Divine Power, and even the True River Valley Lord has not mastered the Supreme Dao Divine Power.

It's not that they don't want to create supreme supernatural powers, it's that they really can't create them, it's really too difficult!

After all, they are not very genius Supreme Dao Realm, if they are really geniuses, they can join the powerful forces, there is no need to join the True River Valley.

"Supreme Dao Divine Powers, if I can create several Supreme Dao Divine Powers, and then improve the Supreme Dao rules a bit, maybe the combat power of the True Body Replicating Body will be enough to match the True River Valley Lord!"

But how can you quickly elevate to the rules of the Dao?

Ye Tian was going to ask about the other Dao realms.
